description_long: This security guard is depicted as a male figure dressed in a full camouflage uniform, including a long-sleeved shirt, matching pants, gloves, and sturdy boots. He wears a wide-brimmed camouflage hat that provides sun protection, and his face is partially shadowed by the brim. The uniform features a green and brown camouflage pattern, suitable for blending into urban parks or wooded areas, with a solid olive drab section on the torso and sleeves. The guard's posture is upright with arms extended horizontally, suggesting readiness or a neutral stance. No visible equipment, badges, or insignia are present on the uniform, giving it a generic, standardized appearance. The overall look is utilitarian and practical, designed for outdoor security duties.
description: A male security guard in a full camouflage uniform with a wide-brimmed hat, gloves, and boots, standing in a neutral, arms-extended pose. The outfit is utilitarian, with no visible insignia or equipment.
description_view_0: Front view shows the security guard's face, wide-brimmed hat, and the full camouflage uniform with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hat, the straight arm, and the layered look of the uniform and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hat, the solid olive drab section on the torso, and the camouflage pattern on the pants and sleeves.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the hat, arm, and uniform details.
attribute_uniform_type: The security guard wears a standardized camouflage uniform consisting of a long-sleeved shirt with a half-zip collar, matching camouflage pants, gloves, and sturdy boots, complemented by a wide-brimmed camouflage hat. The uniform is informal and utilitarian, primarily in green and brown tones with an olive drab torso and sleeves, and lacks any visible formal accessories or variation.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides in a neutral, ready stance.
